smg.text: Cloudy. Showers, heavy at times. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds, occasionally force 5 with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers, heavy at first. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 west to southwesterly winds, becoming northerlies with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 2 to 4 north to northeasterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 2 to 4 east to northeasterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Occasional Thundery showers. Force 2 to 4 east to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds, occasionally force 5 with gusts.
